reason_description.description: A human-readable message describing the reason for the failure.

vendor_account_id.description: The vendor account ID for the account that failed. For Plaid, this is an `account_id`.

vendor_error_message.description: The display_message returned by the vendor. Only returned if reason is set to `PROVIDER_ERROR`. For Plaid, this is the `display_message`.

vendor_request_id.description: A unique identifier for the request from the vendor, which can be used for troubleshooting. Only returned if reason is set to `PROVIDER_ERROR`.
